examples: Our old handcart rattled over the street.
Sometimes I can sit in the handcart before we buy things.
His handcart is still rattling along though it was oiled yesterday.
Unidentified Man: (Reading) The street was still so narrow, a handcart will almost block it when passing by.
The handcart heads back inside Sadr City as another Iraqi army soldier, Sergeant Mohammed, says the boys were hit by a mortar.
